scripts.build: npm --prefix db-models run build && npm --prefix api run build && npm --prefix web run build && npm --prefix worker-node run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix db-models test && npm --prefix api test && npm --prefix worker-node test
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix db-models run typecheck && npm --prefix api run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck && npm --prefix worker-node run typecheck
